message:
feat(service): polish Weighted strategy and add PolledAfterCompletion to LoadShed

Weighted: Improve pick() bounds checking — check weights.is_empty()
before loads.len().min(), and resize current_weights after computing
len rather than before. Simplify on_backend_removed to handle weights
and current_weights with independent bounds checks. Add doc comments
to Strategy::on_backend_inserted/removed hooks. Remove unnecessary
clippy allow on push().

LoadShed: Add PolledAfterCompletion error variant to LoadShedError,
replacing the Done-state panic with a proper error return. This
matches the pattern established in Barrier and Timeout for fail-closed
double-poll detection. Updated Display, Error::source, Debug, and
test coverage for the new variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
